common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
common.updateAvailableMessage: A new version of the app is available. Would you like to update now?

install.installDescription: Install this app on your device for a better experience and offline access.
install.iosInstructions: To install this app on your iOS device, please use Safari:
install.iosStep1: Open this page in Safari browser
install.iosStep2: Tap the Share button at the bottom
install.iosStep3: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"

auth.selectFamilyMemberDescription: Choose who you want to continue as

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.financialHealthInfo: Your financial health score is calculated based on net worth, savings rate, debt-to-income ratio, budget adherence, and goal progress. Excellent (80+), Good (60-79), Fair (40-59), Poor (<40).
dashboard.netWorthInfo: Net Worth = (Wallet Balances + Investment Values) - Total Debts
dashboard.savingsRateInfo: Savings Rate = (Income - Expenses) / Income * 100. Higher is better.
dashboard.debtToIncomeInfo: Debt-to-Income Ratio = Monthly Debt Payments / Monthly Income * 100. Lower is better (aim for <30%).

wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.info: Wallets are where you track your money. Each wallet has its own currency and balance. Transactions, budgets, and savings goals are linked to wallets. Create multiple wallets for different purposes (personal, business, savings).

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.info: Transactions are income (money in) or expenses (money out). They affect wallet balances and are tracked against budgets. Budget status badges show if you're on track (green), at risk (yellow), or exceeded (red).

recurring.title: Recurring Transactions
recurring.info: Recurring transactions are automatically processed on schedule (salary, rent, subscriptions). They affect wallet balances and cash flow projections. The app processes them every 5 minutes when due.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.widgetInfo: This month's budget status. Green = under budget, Yellow = 80-100% spent, Red = exceeded.
budgets.noBudgetsThisMonth: No budgets set for this month.
budgets.info: Budgets help control spending by setting monthly limits per category. Transactions automatically track against budgets. The dashboard shows budget status, and transactions display budget badges. Stay within budgets to improve your financial health score.

savingsGoals.title: Savings Goals
savingsGoals.info: Savings goals help you save for specific purposes. Link investments to goals to track progress. Goals contribute to your financial health score. Transactions can be allocated to goals to track contributions.

investments.title: Investments
investments.info: Investments are assets that grow your net worth. Link investments to savings goals to track goal progress. Investment values are included in net worth calculations. Update current values regularly to track performance.

debts.title: Debts
debts.info: Debts are liabilities that reduce your net worth. Track payments and see how debts affect your financial health. Lower debt-to-income ratio improves your financial health score. Pay down debts to increase net worth.

family.title: Family Members
family.info: Track expenses by family member to understand spending patterns. Assign transactions to family members to see who spends what. Useful for family budget management.
family.insightRecommendation: Consider setting a spending limit for {{name}}

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Your financial advisor
aiAssistant.info: The AI Assistant analyzes all your financial data (wallets, transactions, budgets, goals, investments, debts) to provide personalized recommendations. Ask questions about your finances and get actionable advice to improve your financial health.
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask me anything about your finances...
aiAssistant.errorMessage: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
aiAssistant.welcomeTitle: Welcome! How can I help you today?
aiAssistant.welcomeMessage: I'm here to help you manage your finances better. Ask me anything about your financial situation, goals, or get personalized recommendations.

suggestedQuestions.reduceExpenses: How can I reduce my monthly expenses?
suggestedQuestions.savingsRate: What is my savings rate and how to improve it?
suggestedQuestions.debtPriority: Which debts should I pay first?
suggestedQuestions.savingsGoals: How close am I to my savings goals?

reports.title: Reports
reports.info: Reports combine data from all features: transactions, budgets, investments, and debts. See your complete financial picture with charts and analysis. Use reports to identify trends and make informed decisions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.exchangeRateHelper: This rate will be used as default for new transactions. You can update it from the dashboard exchange rate widget.

userGuide.title: User Guide
userGuide.selectTopic: Select a topic from the table of contents to get started
